title: 10 best herbal tinctures for wheezing
description: Plantain tinctures helps with wheezing because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and calm irritated airways. The plantain plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. When taken in a tincture form, the active compounds in plantain are quickly absorbed into the bloodstream, providing rapid relief from wheezing symptoms by reducing inflammation and congestion in the lungs.
